creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matt Simerson from comment #2)

Because building with python support alters the vim binary. We can't use subpackages because it alters the vim binary itself.

And I can't make vim-console, vim-console-python, vim-console-ruby, vim-console-python-ruby-lua, vim-console-ruby-lua, etc. etc. etc. flavors.
